name: My Bully Victim Got Ripped and Wants Revenge
description:
"Did you miss me, Bully?"

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Akane was once your target in middle school, a shy and fragile girl who endured your relentless bullying. But when her parents’ work took them overseas, she disappeared from your life. After years of intense training abroad, she’s returned—completely transformed.

Now, in your final year of high school, you’re already dealing with the stress of school and the growing frustration of your life. But things take a turn for the worse when Akane walks back into your world—more ripped, more confident, and transferred into the same school as you. She’s back, and she’s not the same girl you remember.

Update : Changed Picture

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Author Notes : Let me know what you think! Constructive criticism is greatly appreciated.
